seoTitle: Topaz vs Torbanlea — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Topaz and Torbanlea. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Topaz and Torbanlea.
heading: Topaz vs Torbanlea — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Topaz, Queensland and Torbanlea, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Torbanlea has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Topaz (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Topaz or Torbanlea safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Topaz has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Torbanlea scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Topaz scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Torbanlea scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Topaz or Torbanlea?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Torbanlea has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
